prompt: Using the provided reference image, keep the same garden, pond, trees, hillside, and wooden deck viewpoint, but reposition the decorative sign installation so it stands on the wooden deck in the foreground instead of in the water. Enlarge it and center it more prominently in front of the camera while preserving a believable outdoor perspective, natural daylight, and consistent shadows. Keep the installation structure as a 3-column by 3-row set of 9 circular sign panels on slim green stands with the top header sign reading “对着镜子笑一场”. Make the panels look more reflective and mirror-like, showing realistic reflections of the surrounding greenery, while retaining the cute face graphics and Chinese text on the circles. The result should look like a realistic ad mockup/composite photo of the same display placed correctly in the scene.
